text:
There once was a girl called Olive. She loved chocolate.

On weekends she'd search old shops. Treasure hunts.

One day she found an old box.

Inside were old chocolate beans.

Plowed them in fields.

Chocolate beans bloomed.

Basked in sun.

That's my berry! She crow Ow. Cocoa owl.

Now I'll knit you. Ow? My needles.

Soft. My home.

I'm a wise owl.

Just one drop.

Goober berries taste weird.

But owl knew.

I'd bake a cake.

You'd love it. Owl think.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
